stemHtml: When considering a Flight Director system, the vertical bar of the pitch and roll crossbars provides information regarding the...

options.a: Direction and the value of the deviation in degrees to be applied to the bank angle to follow the selected flight path.
options.b: Direction and magnitude of the corrections to be applied to the roll attitude of the aircraft to follow the selected flight path.
options.c: Direction of the localiser compared to the aircraft's current position.
options.d: Direction and magnitude of the corrections to be applied to the pitch angle of the aircraft to follow the selected flight path.
